properties.title: IVS2026

en.description:
Innovation Three days to accelerate it

IVS is one of Japan’s largest startup conferences, launched in 2007. Startups, investors, major corporations, and creators from Japan and abroad gather in one place, and in 2026 it will be held in Kyoto under the theme “Japan is Back.”

This year, we are introducing two areas: the culmination edition of the “IVS” area—an evolution of IVS2023, IVS2024, and IVS2025 held in Kyoto (Kyoto City Kangyokan Miyakomesse and ROHM Theatre Kyoto)—and a newly established Reiwa-era, fully invitation-only IVS “IVS CORE” area (Hotel Okura Kyoto). The event will be held across these two areas.

Official Website

IVS Global Ecosystem Gathering

en.description:
The IVS Global Ecosystem Gathering brings together startup ecosystems and communities from around the world with startups, investors, and key ecosystem players in Japan.

Representatives from each participating country or community will first give a one-minute introduction about their ecosystem, activities, and opportunities for collaboration. This will be followed by an open networking session, creating opportunities for international collaboration, investment, and meaningful cross-border connections.

Date & Time: July 3, 11:00–12:00
Venue: IVS Meetup Area, 3rd Floor, Miyako Messe
Language: English

Program
11:00–11:05 Opening
11:05–11:20 One-minute introductions by global ecosystems
11:20–12:00 Open networking

Global Life Science Startup Pitch & Networking @KYOTO

en.description:
As a side event to “IVS Kyoto,” one of Japan’s largest startup conferences, we are hosting a global matching event for the life sciences sector in Kyoto!

At this event, eight cutting-edge life sciences startups from overseas—invited to Japan by JETRO Osaka—will take the stage. In addition to each company’s innovative business pitch, we plan to feature a few presentations about overseas life sciences ecosystem by overseas government agencies.

Following the pitches, we’ve set aside time for networking, where presenting companies, ecosystem stakeholders, and all participants can connect deeply across borders.

We warmly welcome companies seeking to collaborate with overseas startups, investors and researchers eager to engage with the latest technologies, and anyone who wants to help shape the future of life sciences together.

Event Overview

Date & Time: Friday, July 3, 2026, 18:00–20:30
Venue: Kyoto Economic Center, 6th Floor, Conference Room 6D
Organizers / Co-organizers: JETRO Osaka, JETRO Kyoto, Kyoto City, ASTEM (Advanced Scientific Technology & Management Research Institute of Kyoto)
Support: Osaka Prefecture
Admission: Free
Capacity: 80 people (first-come-first-served basis)

Time Table

　18:00　Opening
　18:05　About the Kyoto City Life Sciences Ecosystem
　18:15　Overseas Startup Presentations (4 companies)
　18:35　Presentations on Global Life Sciences Ecosystem by Government Agencies (TBD)
　18:50　Overseas Startup Presentations (4 companies)
　19:10　Networking (light refreshments & drinks) @Conference Room 6C
　20:30　Closing
★ Content is subject to change.
★ Japanese cuisine will be served during the networking session.

Featured Startups

① CanSense (UK)
A UK-based biomedical startup aiming for the early detection of colorectal cancer through a blood test powered by AI and spectroscopy.

② CellProthera (France)
A biotechnology company developing stem cell–based regenerative medicine for purposes such as regenerating cardiac tissue after myocardial infarction.

③ Myomar Molecular (Canada)
A healthtech company developing biomarker diagnostic technology (notably a urine test) to detect and monitor muscle health and early signs of muscle atrophy.

④ NETRI (France)
A biotech company that predicts the efficacy and safety of drugs using “organs-on-chip” technology combining neurons with AI.

⑤ REVEAL GENOMICS (Spain)
A biotechnology company developing genomic diagnostic technology to provide optimal treatment options for cancer patients, starting with breast cancer.

⑥ SwiftPharma (Belgium)
A biotech company that uses plants as bioreactors to produce non-animal-derived pharmaceutical proteins—such as vaccines and antibodies—in a low-cost, sustainable way.

⑦ Viamab Therapeutics (UK)
Developing the world’s first RAGE-targeting antibody-drug conjugate (ADC), focused primarily on metastatic colorectal cancer, with clinical trials set to begin soon.

⑧ ZILIA (Canada)
A medical technology company that uses spectroscopy and AI to non-invasively measure biomarkers such as intraocular oxygen saturation, aiming for the early diagnosis of ocular and systemic diseases.

※ For detailed materials and pitch decks on each startup, please see the link below:
https://www5.jetro.go.jp/newsletter/osd/2026/20260526_HealthX_Connect_Osaka.pdf

※ Your personal information will be properly managed in accordance with JETRO’s privacy policy. For more details, please refer to “Protection of Personal Information.”

en.description:
"Reflection Session" to Light the Future
Before heading home, let's wrap up.


Before you leave Kyoto, join us for a relaxed reflection session.

We've reserved a small venue just a 4-minute walk from Kyoto Station, making it easy to stop by before your heading home.

About

This isn't about reflecting on the past for its own sake. It's about using reflection to shape what comes next.

We want to turn the energy and inspiration from IVS into concrete action before everyone returns to their daily routine.

To be honest, we have no idea how many people will come, so we've intentionally chosen a cozy venue.

Even if you can't join us in person, we'd still love to hear your thoughts. If you register, we'll send you a short reflection form so you can participate remotely.

At the venue, we'll look back on our IVS experience together while taking time to reflect individually.

Think of it as solo camping... done together.

Our reflection is intentionally simple:

① What did you gain during these three days?
→ Your highlights, discoveries, and happy moments.

② What could you have done better?
→ Lessons, missed opportunities, and things to improve.

③ So... what will you do next?
→ Three actions you'll take immediately, plus one long-term commitment.

Share as much or as little as you'd like.

This event is also part of an experiment for our AI development. Responses will be collected and analyzed only in anonymized form. By participating, you acknowledge and agree to this.

Who Should Join

  • IVS participants

  • Startup founders

  • Corporate innovators

  • Investors

  • Ecosystem builders

  • Anyone interested in startups, innovation, or global business

Feel free to bring your own food and drinks.

Drop in casually, stay as long as you like.

Admission is free.
If you enjoy the event, you're welcome to leave a small donation in the contribution box.

Date & Time

Friday, July 3, 2026
7:00 PM – 9:00 PM

Venue

LEAF Kyoto (Small Meeting Room)
24-22 Higashikujo Kitakarasuma-cho, Minami-ku, Kyoto

(4-minute walk from Kyoto Station)

Admission

Free

Bring your own food and drinks.

Capacity

Max 15 people at the venue.

*If you cannot attend in person, you can still participate by simply submitting the form (no real-time attendance required). Details will be announced at https://www.tetratokyo.com/ivs2026 and via 4S message around 7 PM on July 3rd. Please register today for those form-submitting participation.

Hosted by

Tetra Tokyo

Notes

  • A valid IVS 2026 pass (IVS PASS, IVS PASS STUDENT, CORE PASS, or CORE PASS Startup) is required.

  • No alcohol for minors.

  • No smoking inside the venue.

  • No religious solicitation, MLM, or sales activities.

  • Photos and videos may be taken during the event. Please let us know in advance if you prefer not to appear.

  • Harassment of any kind will not be tolerated.

Sister Event #1

July 1 (Day 1 of IVS)

Our late-night side event returns to the exact same venue as last year. Casual, unpolished, and somehow it worked—so we're doing it again.
https://4s.link/en/cat1

Sister Event #2

July 2 (Day 2 of IVS)

The same format returns for Day 2, this time in a slightly shorter one-hour version.
https://4s.link/en/cat2
